title: Dhandai Devi
tagline: Dhandai Devi — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Adi Shakti Dhandai Devi (Mahalakshmi) Mandir is a Hindu temple located at Mhasdi near Sakri Taluka in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Adi Shakti Dhandai Devi (Mahalakshmi) Mandir is a Hindu temple located at Mhasdi near Sakri Taluka in Maharashtra, India. Here, the worship of the goddess Shree Dhandai Devi is carried on right next to the Dhandai Plane, once a center of Hinduism. The temple is a prime spot of worship for the Marathi people of Khandesh region. But along with the Marathi Family Kulswamini Dhandai Devi is worshipped by many other caste, people especially those belonging to the Marathi Brahmins, Maratha-Kunbi and somewhat Lonari and Marathi Mali caste as their presiding family deity, Kuldevi or Kuldevta in Khande

topPlaces.name: Lower Panzara Dam
topPlaces.description: Lower Panzara Dam, also known as Akkalpada Dam, is an earthfill dam on Panzara river near Akkalpada (Sakri) in Dhule district in Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Lower Panzara Dam, also known as Akkalpada Dam, is an earthfill dam on Panzara river near Akkalpada (Sakri) in Dhule district in Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dhandai Devi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dhandai Devi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dhandai Devi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jalgaon Airport (126 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (120 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dhandai Devi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dhandai Devi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dhandai Devi?
faq.a: Stays in Dhandai Devi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dhandai Devi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lower Panzara Dam.
